recursos.title: All Resources
recursos.subtitle: Practical PDF guides for every stage of caregiving.

cambios-de-memoria.title: Understanding Memory Changes
cambios-de-memoria.description: Learn the difference between normal aging and memory concerns.
cambios-de-memoria.longDescription: This guide helps you understand when forgetfulness is part of normal aging and when it may be a sign of something more. Includes checklists, questions for your doctor, and practical home strategies.

comunicacion-efectiva.title: Communicating with Confidence
comunicacion-efectiva.description: Practical tips for meaningful conversations and less frustration.
comunicacion-efectiva.longDescription: Learn communication techniques tailored for older adults with memory loss. Includes phrases that work, common mistakes to avoid, and how to navigate difficult conversations calmly and compassionately.

comportamientos-dificiles.title: Handling Difficult Behaviors
comportamientos-dificiles.description: Effective strategies for challenging situations with compassion.
comportamientos-dificiles.longDescription: A step-by-step guide to understanding and responding to behaviors like agitation, aggression, repetition, and resistance to care. Based on techniques validated by dementia experts.

rutinas-diarias.title: Daily Routines for Cognitive Support
rutinas-diarias.description: Build routines that promote independence and well-being.
rutinas-diarias.longDescription: Predictable routines reduce anxiety and promote autonomy. This guide includes morning, evening, and activity routine templates adapted for different levels of need.

seguridad-en-el-hogar.title: Home Safety
seguridad-en-el-hogar.description: A complete checklist to make the home safer for older adults.
seguridad-en-el-hogar.longDescription: A thorough home review guide: kitchen, bathroom, stairs, lighting, and more. Includes product recommendations, low-cost modifications, and a printable checklist.

autocuidado-cuidador.title: Caregiver Self-Care
autocuidado-cuidador.description: Strategies to prevent burnout and maintain your well-being.
autocuidado-cuidador.longDescription: Caring for a loved one is exhausting. This guide offers concrete tools to recognize caregiver burnout, set healthy boundaries, and find time for yourself without feeling guilty.

alimentacion-y-nutricion.title: Nutrition & Eating
alimentacion-y-nutricion.description: Practical nutrition guide for older adults with dementia.
alimentacion-y-nutricion.longDescription: Includes easy meal ideas, how to manage appetite loss, adaptations for swallowing difficulties, and strategies to make mealtimes more enjoyable.

signos-de-alerta.title: Warning Signs: When to Seek Help
signos-de-alerta.description: Learn to recognize signs that require immediate medical attention.
signos-de-alerta.longDescription: A quick reference guide for knowing when a change in behavior, mobility, or mood is urgent. Includes a list of symptoms to report to the doctor and how to prepare for those conversations.
